metadata.author: Core Team
metadata.description: Use step-by-step execution to follow a two-transfer solution, then reset and try again if needed.

introduces: step-by-step execution and reset for debugging a short solution

messages.title: This level is for stepping through the program
messages.body: The solution is still short, but now it has more than one transfer. Use Step to see each change happen, and use Reset if you want to restart the board from the beginning.

messages.title: Watch the board after each step
messages.body: If the result is not right, inspect the board after each action. The goal is not only to finish, but also to understand which move changes the state.

messages.title: Repeat the same transfer rule carefully
messages.body: This level works by repeating the same move twice. Step through it and check whether each transfer leaves the board closer to the goal.
